query:
SELECT pt.id, pt.partnerId, p.companyName, r.name as regionName, c.name as countryName 
FROM partner_territories pt 
JOIN partners p ON p.id = pt.partnerId 
JOIN regions r ON r.id = pt.regionId 
JOIN countries c ON c.id = r.countryId 
LIMIT 10;
